title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 11 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, the main contract I 2309 closed 798.5, an increase of 1.53% throughout the day.some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable. PBF at Shandong port dealt 885-896 yuan/mt; prices are mixed today over yesterday.
